action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 with a single Linear layer performed slightly worse (0.7129) than Iteration 8 with an MLP (0.7175). Analysis: The MLP regressor captures some useful non-linearities. Furthermore, we previously found that the 150M model overfit when using AttentionPooling (Iteration 4), but the CNN + MeanPooling architecture provides a strong inductive bias for additive extrapolation. Combining the larger 150M model (for better representations) with the CNN + MeanPooling architecture (for better extrapolation) could yield the best results. Decision: Update model.py to use ESM-2 150M, unfreeze 1 layer, use a 2-layer CNN (kernel 7, 256 channels), and an MLP regressor. Train for 6 epochs with batch size 32. Submit for evaluation.
